special_mechanics.name: Jump Kick
special_mechanics.description: Combination attack performed by pressing punch and kick simultaneously (B and A buttons)

special_mechanics.name: Back Punch
special_mechanics.description: Performed by holding d-pad in opposite direction and pressing B simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player can pick up throwing knives and machine gun dropped by defeated enemies. Knife can be preserved by using kicks instead of punch. Machine gun can be fired or used for gun whipping.

special_mechanics.name: Hand Grenades
special_mechanics.description: New to NES version; usable during boss encounters (helicopter in Stage 1, tank in Stage 4)

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources document gameplay mechanics and control schemes but contain no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, gravity values, acceleration rates, frame data). NES version is single-player port with modifications from arcade original.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - P.O.W.: Prisoners of War (NES)
